<!-- What actually happens — include error messages verbatim -->

## Severity
- [ ] P0 — Production is down / data loss occurring
- [ ] P1 — Major feature broken or security issue
- [ ] P2 — Feature degraded but a workaround exists
- [ ] P3 — Cosmetic or minor inconvenience
